title: spartina stricta var. alterniflora
intro: Spartina stricta var. alterniflora, also known as saltwort, is a coastal plant species that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Spartina stricta var. alterniflora include reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive problems, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically harvested and prepared for medicinal use by making teas, infusions, or decoctions from the leaves and roots.
